title: Evals Are Broken, Use Them Anyway — Ara Khan, Cline
summary: Ara Khan argues that AI benchmarks are neither gospel nor irrelevant, but require systematic analysis of failure modes. He proposes a three-zone framework: obvious bugs, nuanced improvements specific to model families, and overfitting risks. Improvements to Cline on Terminal Bench came from infrastructure tuning and prompt engineering, not model upgrades.
